title: Add J.aRVIS to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [J.aRVIS](https://github.com/cifik1-lgtm/J.aRVIS) to bots
- JARVIS: Cifik Intelegents 🤖🦾

Fixes #11037

gist.headline: J.aRVIS joins the hive
gist.blurb: A new bot has entered the chat! J.aRVIS by Cifik Intelegents just landed in the community greenhouse.
gist.summary: Added the J.aRVIS bot by Cifik Intelegents to the community apps showcase and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore the J.aRVIS bot in the community projects directory.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new friendly robot (representing J.aRVIS) into a lush digital greenhouse, symbolizing the addition of a new community bot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot welcoming a sleek but chunky new robot friend into a lush digital greenhouse. The robot has a glowing visor and holds a small potted code-plant. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot welcoming a sleek but chunky new robot friend into a lush digital greenhouse.
